shell.projectSkillUnavailable: This environment cannot read project skills

docs.heading: Docs
docs.placeholder: Docs view placeholder. You can wire routing or a WebView here.

filePanel.unsupported: This environment cannot load the file tree
filePanel.heading: Files
filePanel.truncated: Many files; showing the first 1200 entries

general.projectSkillsCaption: When enabled, each project lists skills from the project folder above thread history, separated by a divider.
general.showProjectSkillsHint: Only project-level skill entries; choosing one starts a new thread and sends the slash command.
general.statusOn: On — the sidebar shows project skills.
general.statusOff: Off — the sidebar shows only projects and thread history.
general.languageCaption: Choose English or Chinese. The UI reloads fully after you restart the app.
general.languageRestartHint: Language preference saved. Quit and reopen the app to apply it across the interface.

models.pageLede: Configure model providers, credentials, and model mappings for Claude Agent. The active request profile is still switched from the model menu next to the chat composer.
models.settingsFirstDesc: For the entry selected in chat, non-empty fields override environment variables with the same name; empty fields fall back to env values.
models.envOnlyDesc: Reads only ANTHROPIC_* variables from the Electron main process environment.
models.providersCaption: Clicking a row only opens the form below; it does not switch the chat model from this page. Identifiers you enter for Haiku / Sonnet / Opus mappings all appear in the chat model menu (one row per identifier).
models.deleteKeepOne: Keep at least one model profile
models.detailCaption: Matches the highlighted row above; changes here do not switch the active provider for chat (use the model menu next to the composer).
models.fieldNameHint: Optional label for easier recognition in the list.
models.fieldApiKeyHint: Maps to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; can be combined with environment variables (see configuration source).
models.fieldBaseUrlHint: Maps to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL; leave blank to keep using environment variables.
models.envCaption: Summary of the main process environment for reference only; it is not changed when you click Save.
models.metaNoCredentials: API key / Base URL not configured yet

chat.modelPickerTitle: Choose model configuration for this chat
chat.modelPickerAria: Choose model configuration for this chat
chat.permissionModePlanDesc: Analyze and propose a plan without running file edits or commands.
chat.permissionModeAutoDesc: The SDK classifies tool requests and still asks you when needed.
chat.permissionModeDefaultDesc: Read tools run automatically; file edits and commands ask first.
chat.permissionModeFullDesc: Skip permission checks and let the agent edit files and run commands.
chat.useExistingFolderSub: Add a folder to the project list
chat.refreshContextTitle: Refresh skills / agents for this project
chat.askQuestionCancelled: The question was cancelled by the user.
chat.permissionDeniedByUser: The permission request was denied by the user.
chat.bridgeErrorBody: Claude bridge is unavailable. Run the app in Electron.
chat.slashCompactDesc: Compact the current session context while keeping what you need to continue.
chat.slashStatusDesc: Inspect session, model, tools, and context state.
chat.slashHelpDesc: List slash commands available to Claude Agent in this session.
